embedding.enabled.label: Enable Embeddings
embedding.enabled.help: Enable vector embeddings for semantic search, vector deduplication, and background backfill

embedding.provider.label: Embedding Provider
embedding.provider.help: Embedding provider: ollama, openai, gemini, etc.

embedding.apiKey.label: API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for cloud embedding providers

embedding.baseUrl.label: Base URL
embedding.baseUrl.help: Custom API base URL for the embedding provider

embedding.dimensions.label: Dimensions
embedding.dimensions.help: Embedding dimensions when they cannot be auto-detected

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically extract and store memories from conversations

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: "extract" uses the LLM extractor. "off" disables auto-capture.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories and the cached profile into prompts

profileFrequency.label: Profile Rebuild Frequency
profileFrequency.help: Rebuild the cached profile every N interactions

maxLongTermItems.label: Max Long-Term Items
maxLongTermItems.help: Maximum memories shown in the long-term profile section

maxRecentItems.label: Max Recent Items
maxRecentItems.help: Maximum memories shown in the recent profile section

recentWindowDays.label: Recent Window Days
recentWindowDays.help: How many days count as recent for episodic memories

profileScanLimit.label: Profile Scan Limit
profileScanLimit.help: Maximum active memories scanned when rebuilding the profile

promptMemoryMaxChars.label: Prompt Memory Max Chars
promptMemoryMaxChars.help: Maximum characters per memory when injecting profile or recall context

temporalDecayDays.label: Temporal Decay Days
temporalDecayDays.help: Days before stale unpinned episodic memories are removed

maxRecallResults.label: Max Recall Results
maxRecallResults.help: Default maximum results returned by memory search

vectorWeight.label: Vector Weight
vectorWeight.help: Weight for vector similarity during hybrid search

textWeight.label: Text Weight
textWeight.help: Weight for keyword search during hybrid search

graphWeight.label: Graph Weight
graphWeight.help: Weight for related-memory expansion during hybrid search

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Chars
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum characters from the assembled turn sent to the extractor

minScore.label: Min Score
minScore.help: Minimum combined score for a result to be returned (0–1)

vectorMinScoreFactor.label: Vector Min Score Factor
vectorMinScoreFactor.help: Vector score floor as a fraction of minScore (0–1)

graphSeedLimit.label: Graph Seed Limit
graphSeedLimit.help: Max top results used as seeds for graph hop expansion

graphHopDepth.label: Graph Hop Depth
graphHopDepth.help: Number of relationship hops followed during graph expansion (1–5)

mmrLambda.label: MMR Lambda
mmrLambda.help: Maximal Marginal Relevance diversity weight (0 = pure diversity, 1 = pure relevance)

autoRecallMaxMemories.label: Auto-Recall Max Memories
autoRecallMaxMemories.help: Cap on how many memories are injected per auto-recall turn

autoRecallMinScore.label: Auto-Recall Min Score
autoRecallMinScore.help: Minimum score for a memory to be injected by auto-recall (0–1)

nearDuplicateThreshold.label: Near-Duplicate Threshold
nearDuplicateThreshold.help: Vector cosine similarity above which two memories are considered near-duplicates (0–1)

lexicalDuplicateThreshold.label: Lexical Duplicate Threshold
lexicalDuplicateThreshold.help: Normalized edit-distance similarity above which two memories are considered lexical duplicates (0–1)

updateVectorMinScore.label: Update Vector Min Score
updateVectorMinScore.help: Vector similarity threshold that triggers an update relationship instead of a new memory (0–1)

maxRelatedEdges.label: Max Related Edges
maxRelatedEdges.help: Maximum number of 'related' graph edges stored per memory (0–20)

extractorMaxItems.label: Extractor Max Items
extractorMaxItems.help: Maximum memory candidates returned per LLM extraction pass (1–50)
